name: Brambles Limited
analysis: BXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$19.0800, stop A$16.6023, target A$22.2200 (1.27:1) — then trail it.
